opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My heart is jumping all over the place like a fish out of water, and I feel completely washed out. It started suddenly a few hours ago and I'm getting a bit worried.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been going on for about four hours now and isn't settling, and I feel lightheaded, so I thought I'd better get checked rather than just wait.

symptom_narrative.onset: started suddenly about four hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: constant since it started, hasn't let up
symptom_narrative.character: a rapid fluttering feeling in my chest, all over the place, not a steady beat
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: quite uncomfortable and unsettling, and it's making me feel washed out and tired
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on suddenly and has stayed constant since
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: resting in bed seems to help a little, but it hasn't gone away
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: I noticed it more when I got up to walk to the bathroom, I felt more short of breath then
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel generally washed out and a bit lightheaded, but I haven't actually fainted
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this has happened to me before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've been resting in bed, don't feel up to doing much at all right now

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live by myself, so feeling dizzy like this has made me a bit nervous being on my own

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: worried about being alone if something worse happens, wants reassurance about whether it's safe to stay home

communication_style.typical_message_style: writes in full sentences, describes symptoms clearly, mentions being alone

access_barriers.other: lives alone, no one immediately available at home if symptoms worsen
